description_long: This is a small, sleek airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a predominantly yellow and white color scheme. The wings are long and straight, attached at a mid-fuselage position, and feature slight upward tips. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, suggesting a single or dual-seat configuration. The tail section has a T-tail design, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin. No visible engines or landing gear are present, indicating a glider or unpowered aircraft design. The overall form is aerodynamic, with smooth surfaces and minimal external protrusions.
description: A small, streamlined yellow and white airplane with a blue-tinted enclosed cockpit, mid-mounted straight wings, and a T-tail design. The surface is smooth and aerodynamic, with no visible engines or landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, straight wings with upward tips, the blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and the T-tail configuration.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated nose, the cockpit placement at the front, and the vertical and horizontal stabilizers forming the T-tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the wings, the T-tail structure, and the tapering fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cockpit, wing, and tail arrangement from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with long, straight wings featuring slight upward tips and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engine; appears to be a glider or unpowered aircraft.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
